footer.tagline: Plan the hunt. Run the pack.

hero.phrase1: Track AI spend across Claude Code, Cursor, and more.
hero.phrase2: 5 AI tools. One CLI. Real-time cost visibility.
hero.phrase3: Catch budget overruns before they hit your bill.

howItWorks.heading: How the Pack Works
howItWorks.subheading: Three commands. Unlimited scale. Every step is transparent, recoverable, and validated.
howItWorks.planCardDescription: Claude analyzes your entire codebase before writing a single line of code. It maps dependency trees, identifies affected files, and assigns the right specialist agents with explicit acceptance criteria. No assumptions. No wasted tokens.
howItWorks.buildCardDescription: Hub-and-spoke execution dispatches specialist agents in dependency order. Frontend waits for the API. The API waits for the schema. A dedicated quality engineer validates independently -- never the agent that wrote the code.
howItWorks.shipCardDescription: Auto-create a GitHub PR with a generated title and body. Kova links related issues, lists completed tasks, and shows build status. Zero manual PR writing. Idea to merged PR without leaving your terminal.

features.heading: Built for Developers Who Ship
features.subheading: Every feature is designed around one goal: getting correct, validated code merged -- faster.
features.feature1Description: Each agent is an expert in its domain: frontend, backend, database, security, quality, performance.
features.feature1Hover: frontend-specialist, backend-engineer, database-architect, security-auditor, quality-engineer, performance-optimizer, and 11 more. Each one trained on its domain patterns.
features.feature2Description: Tasks wait for prerequisites. No building on assumptions. Explicit task graphs.
features.feature2Hover: Define task relationships with addBlockedBy and addBlocks. The hub orchestrator enforces order -- your frontend never starts before the API is validated.
features.feature3Description: Haiku for typos. Sonnet for features. Opus for architecture. 3-10x cost savings.
features.feature3Hover: Auto-selects the right model per task. Trivial fixes use haiku. Features use sonnet. Architectural decisions get opus. You only pay for what the task needs.
features.feature4Description: Checkpoint every task. Resume with --resume. Never lose progress.
features.feature4Hover: Every completed task writes a checkpoint. Rate limit? Power failure? Run kova build --resume and pick up exactly where you stopped. No wasted work.
features.feature5Description: Per-task and per-build token usage. Warnings at 80% and 95%.
features.feature5Hover: Real-time token counters per agent. Session-level budget warnings at 80% and 95% thresholds. Know your costs before the bill arrives.
features.feature6Description: Auto-branches, issue linking, PR creation. Idea to merged PR.
features.feature6Hover: kova pr creates a branch, writes a PR title and body, links related issues, and opens the PR -- all from the session context. Zero context switching.

cta.heading: Join the Pack
cta.subheading: Open source. Free forever. Ship faster.

pricing.heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subheading: Free forever for solo developers. Pro for teams that want full visibility into AI tool spend.
pricing.trustedBy: Trusted by developer teams tracking their AI costs
pricing.allPricesNote: All prices in USD per seat. Annual plans billed yearly. Cancel anytime. Enterprise pricing scales linearly with seat count.
pricing.tierFreeDescription: One developer, Claude Code tracking, 30-day local history.
pricing.tierProDescription: All 5 AI tools tracked, 1-year cloud history, team dashboard, and budget alerts.
pricing.tierEnterpriseDescription: Pro plus SSO, audit log exports, API access, and priority support.
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Cancel your subscription at any time from the dashboard. You will keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq2A: Each developer who runs kova track and syncs data to the dashboard counts as one seat. API keys are per-developer.
pricing.faq3Q: How does the free plan differ from Pro?
pricing.faq3A: Free gives you 1 tool (Claude Code), 30-day local history, and basic cost tracking. Pro unlocks all 5 AI tools, 1-year cloud history, team dashboard, budget alerts, and cost forecasting.
pricing.faq4A: Yes. Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly. Toggle the billing switch on any plan to see annual pricing.
pricing.faq5A: Kova tracks Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, and Devin. More tools are added regularly.
pricing.faq6A: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use Supabase with Row Level Security, rate limiting, and HTTPS enforcement. Your usage data is never shared with third parties.
